name: components/collapsible
description: An interactive wrapper that expands or collapses a content section with smooth height animations (collapsible-up/collapsible-down). Composed of Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, and CollapsibleContent. Lighter-weight than Accordion when only a single toggleable region is needed, with full Kobalte accessibility support.
useCases: Expandable code blocks or JSON viewers in documentation pages
Show-more/show-less toggles for long product descriptions or article excerpts
Inline filter panels that can be collapsed to save vertical space in search UIs
Mobile navigation sub-menus that expand on demand without an accordion structure
